text: Walked through how the openreview evidence pipeline wires together: how a protocol document links to the findings and results table, why the protocol menu was missing the extraction profile field, how the extraction profile drives findings, where the effect column ties into results classification, and how the summary field surfaces in the UI. Traced and verified the dashboard logic that pops up a protocol or brief once it is ready â€” the notification appeared to be flaky, so a new protocol document was created live to watch it surface, which confirmed the pop-up works, and the test document was then deleted. Closed with an orientation recap for the user returning to the project after time away, framing current state and next steps across their several sessions in the repo. No code changes landed; the work was investigative and verification-focused around protocol/extraction-profile/findings wiring and the dashboard ready-notification.
